mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.`order` (user_id, orderer_name, orderer_email, orderer_phone, receiver_name, receiver_phone, address_postal, address_primary, address_secondary, delivery_request, delivery_fee, final_amount, used_coupon_id, coupon_discount, used_point, payment_method, status) VALUES (#{userId}, #{ordererName}, #{ordererEmail}, #{ordererPhone}, #{receiverName}, #{receiverPhone}, #{addressPostal}, #{addressPrimary}, #{addressSecondary}, #{deliveryRequest}, #{deliveryFee}, #{finalAmount}, #{usedCouponId}, #{couponDiscount}, #{usedPoint}, #{paymentMethod}, #{status})
INSERT INTO `petlog`.order_item (order_id, product_id, option_id, quantity, price) VALUES (#{orderId}, #{productId}, #{optionId}, #{quantity}, #{price})
INSERT INTO `petlog`.point (user_id, type, `change`, order_id, description) VALUES (#{userId}, 'USE', -#{amount}, #{orderId}, '포인트 사용')
mapper.update: UPDATE `petlog`.user_coupon SET status = 'USED', used_at = NOW(), order_id = #{orderId} WHERE id = #{userCouponId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `petlog`.point (user_id, type, `change`, order_id, description) VALUES (#{userId}, 'EARN', #{amount}, #{orderId}, '구매 적립')
